data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tier-based perk visibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for tier-based visibility, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or data related to this specific requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for tier-based perk visibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows.
